modules.name: Module 1: Networking Models, Physical Signals & Layer Transmissions

topics.title: Networking Architectures
subtopics: OSI 7-layer model vs TCP/IP protocol suite boundary mappings

topics.title: Physical Signalings
subtopics: Guided media types
Nyquist and Shannon channel capacity limits equations

topics.title: Layer Transmissions
subtopics: Framing algorithms
Bit stuffing, and Cyclic Redundancy Check (CRC) error detection math

topics.title: MAC Sublayer
subtopics: Carrier Sense Multiple Access (CSMA/CD) collisions
Backoff algorithms math under congestion

topics.title: Ethernet Switches
subtopics: MAC table learning loops
VLAN tagging protocols, and collision domains segregation

modules.name: Module 2: Network Layer Routing, IP Subnetting & CIDR

topics.title: IP Protocol
subtopics: IPv4 header structures
IP packet fragmentation bounds, and IPv6 migration updates

topics.title: IP Subnetting
subtopics: Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) subnet masks calculations
IP address allocations

topics.title: Routing Algorithms
subtopics: Link State (OSPF Dijkstra) vs Distance Vector (RIP Bellman-Ford count-to-infinity)

topics.title: Internet Routing
subtopics: Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) path-vector evaluations
Autonomous Systems paths

topics.title: Translation & Config
subtopics: Network Address Translation (NAT) table bindings
ARP table resolution
DHCP handshakes

modules.name: Module 3: Transport Layer Protocols, TCP Connections & Congestion Loops

topics.title: Transport Services
subtopics: UDP stateless multiplexing vs TCP stateful byte-stream deliveries comparison

topics.title: TCP Connection
subtopics: Three-way handshake, sequence numbers synchronization, and 4-step connection teardown

topics.title: Sliding Window
subtopics: TCP flow control sliding window, sender/receiver buffers calculations, and Silly Window Syndrome

topics.title: TCP Congestion Control
subtopics: Slow Start thresholds, Congestion Avoidance increments, Fast Retransmit, and Fast Recovery states

topics.title: Connection Timeouts
subtopics: Round-Trip Time (RTT) estimations equations, and exponential backoff timeouts calculations

modules.name: Module 4: Application Layer Protocols, DNS Resolvers & Web Connections

topics.title: DNS Internals
subtopics: Recursive vs Iterative DNS query paths, TLD root servers, and DNS caching TTL bounds

topics.title: HTTP Protocol
subtopics: HTTP/1.1 pipelining HOL blocking, HTTP/2 connection multiplexing, and HTTP/3 QUIC UDP migrations

topics.title: Mail & Files
subtopics: SMTP protocol relays, POP3 vs IMAP states, and FTP control/data streams

topics.title: Web Caches
subtopics: Reverse proxy servers (Nginx), HTTP cache headers validation rules (ETag, Cache-Control)

topics.title: Content Delivery (CDN)
subtopics: CDNs geo-routing DNS resolutions, static file edge servers, and origin shields

modules.name: Module 5: Network Security, Cryptographic Handshakes & Firewalls

topics.title: Symmetric/Asymmetric Encryption
subtopics: Public/Private key pairs mathematical foundations
RSA algorithms

topics.title: TLS Handshake
subtopics: TLS 1.3 key exchange (ECDHE) protocol, cipher suites negotiation, and session resumption

topics.title: Digital Certificates
subtopics: Public Key Infrastructure (PKI), Certification Authorities (CA) chain verification loops

topics.title: Network Firewalls
subtopics: Packet filtering rules (stateless vs stateful firewalls)
DDoS mitigation techniques

topics.title: IPSec & VPNs
subtopics: Encapsulating Security Payload (ESP) headers, tunnel vs transport modes, and secure routing
